title: Create SX126x Renode peripheral model
description: C# peripheral model for SX1262 LoRa radio in Renode. Can either: (1) implement register interface with TCP bridge to lichen-sim, or (2) port LichenSubGHz approach. Must support TX/RX, IRQ, SPI interface. Reference: lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/peripherals/LichenSubGHz.cs
close_reason: SX1262.cs committed - magic SPI peripheral bridging to lichen-sim
